bird.name: Grey-green fruit dove
bird.summary: The grey-green fruit dove (Ptilinopus purpuratus) is a species of bird in the family Columbidae. It is endemic to the Society Islands in Fr…

relations.subject: Grey-green fruit dove
relations.evidence: There is an ongoing slow population decline due to habitat destruction, the introduction of non-native plants, predation by invasive species such as the swamp harrier and feral cats, and competition by invasive red-vented bulbul and common myna
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
